# SIJIL MASTER EXTRACTION
# Purpose: Source of truth for building Qwen ingestion prompt
# Generated by reading every file — nothing from memory
# Date: 2026-07-03
# Repo: sijil-core

---
## SCHEMA: src/schemas/common.schema.js

### Exported Schemas
- SlugSchema
- idSchema(prefix) - factory function
- PresentationProfileSchema
- BaseBlockFields

### SlugSchema
**Type:** z.string()
**Constraints:** 
- Regex: `/^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$/` (lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens)
- Max length: 80 characters
**Error message:** "Invalid slug format"

### idSchema(prefix)
**Type:** Factory function returning z.string()
**Constraints:**
- Regex: `^${prefix}_[a-z0-9]+$` (prefix underscore lowercase alphanumeric)
**Error message:** `ID must start with ${prefix}_`

### PresentationProfileSchema
**Type:** z.object()
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Enum Values / Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|--------------------------|
| visual_layer_type | z.string() | No | "standard_card" | — |
| theme_overrides | z.object().passthrough() | No | {} | Any additional properties allowed |
| animation_trigger | z.enum() | No | "on-scroll" | "on-scroll", "on-load", "on-hover", "none" |
| tailwind_classes | z.string() | No | "" | — |

### BaseBlockFields
**Type:** Plain object (not a Zod schema, used as building block)
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| _id | idSchema('blk') | Yes | — | Must match `blk_[a-z0-9]+` |
| block_order | z.number().int().positive() | Yes | — | Positive integer |
| source_page | z.number().int().positive() | Yes | — | Positive integer |
| html | z.string().min(1) | Yes | — | Non-empty string |
| presentation_profile | PresentationProfileSchema | Yes | default({}) | Nested object |

---
## SCHEMA: src/schemas/formula.schema.js

### Exported Schemas
- FormulaSchema

### FormulaSchema
**Type:** z.object()
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Enum Values / Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|--------------------------|
| formula_id | idSchema('frm') | No | — | Must match `frm_[a-z0-9]+` if provided |
| name | z.string().min(1) | Yes | — | Non-empty string |
| latex | z.string().min(1) | Yes | — | Non-empty string (KaTeX syntax) |
| text | z.string().min(1) | Yes | — | Non-empty string (plain English description) |
| formula_type | z.enum() | Yes | — | "definition", "derivation", "law", "empirical" |
| variables | z.array() | No | [] | Array of variable objects (see below) |
| source_page | z.number().int().positive() | No | — | Positive integer |
| subject_area | z.string() | No | — | — |
| block_order_ref | z.number().int() | No | — | Integer |

**variables array item schema:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| symbol | z.string() | Yes | — | — |
| name | z.string() | Yes | — | — |
| unit | z.string() | No | — | — |
| description | z.string() | No | — | — |

---
## SCHEMA: src/schemas/mcq.schema.js

### Exported Schemas
- MCQSchema

### MCQSchema
**Type:** z.object()
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Enum Values / Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|--------------------------|
| mcq_id | idSchema('mcq') | No | — | Must match `mcq_[a-z0-9]+` if provided |
| question_number | z.string() | No | — | — |
| question_text | z.string().min(1) | Yes | — | Non-empty string |
| options | z.object() | Yes | — | Fixed structure with a, b, c, d keys |
| options.a | z.string() | Yes | — | Option A text |
| options.b | z.string() | Yes | — | Option B text |
| options.c | z.string() | Yes | — | Option C text |
| options.d | z.string() | Yes | — | Option D text |
| correct_answer | z.enum() | Yes | — | "a", "b", "c", "d" |
| explanation | z.string() | No | "" | Empty string default |
| difficulty | z.enum() | No | — | "easy", "medium", "hard" |
| bloom_level | z.string() | No | — | — |
| source_page | z.number().int().positive() | No | — | Positive integer |
| past_paper_years | z.array(z.string()) | No | [] | Array of year strings |

---
## SCHEMA: src/schemas/blocks.schema.js

### Exported Schemas
- HeadingBlockSchema
- ParagraphBlockSchema
- FormulaBlockSchema
- FigureBlockSchema
- TableBlockSchema
- CalloutBlockSchema
- MCQBlockSchema
- ExampleBlockSchema
- ListBlockSchema
- DefinitionBlockSchema
- LearningOutcomesBlockSchema
- ComparisonViewBlockSchema
- QuranVerseBlockSchema
- QuranReferenceBlockSchema
- ActivityBlockSchema
- EquationBlockSchema
- NumericalBlockSchema
- ContentBlockSchema (discriminated union)

### BaseBlockFields (inherited by all blocks)
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| _id | idSchema('blk') | Yes | — | `blk_[a-z0-9]+` |
| block_order | z.number().int().positive() | Yes | — | Positive integer |
| source_page | z.number().int().positive() | Yes | — | Positive integer |
| html | z.string().min(1) | Yes | — | Non-empty string |
| presentation_profile | PresentationProfileSchema | Yes | default({}) | Nested object |

### HeadingBlockSchema
**Type:** z.object() with BaseBlockFields spread
**Discriminator:** type = "heading"
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| type | z.literal("heading") | Yes | — | — |
| level | z.number().int().min(1).max(6) | Yes | — | 1-6 |
| text | z.string().min(1) | Yes | — | Non-empty |
| slug_anchor | SlugSchema | Yes | — | Valid slug format |

### ParagraphBlockSchema
**Type:** z.object() with BaseBlockFields spread
**Discriminator:** type = "paragraph"
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| type | z.literal("paragraph") | Yes | — | — |
| text | z.string().min(1) | Yes | — | Non-empty |
| contains_formula | z.boolean() | No | false | — |
| key_terms_in_text | z.array(z.string()) | No | [] | Array of term strings |

### FormulaBlockSchema
**Type:** z.object() with BaseBlockFields + FormulaSchema.shape spread
**Discriminator:** type = "formula"
**Fields:** All FormulaSchema fields plus:
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| type | z.literal("formula") | Yes | — | — |
| formula_id | idSchema('frm') | Yes | — | `frm_[a-z0-9]+` |

### FigureBlockSchema
**Type:** z.object() with BaseBlockFields spread
**Discriminator:** type = "figure"
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| type | z.literal("figure") | Yes | — | — |
| figure_id | idSchema('fig') | Yes | — | `fig_[a-z0-9]+` |
| figure_number | z.string() | Yes | — | — |
| caption | z.string().min(1) | Yes | — | Non-empty |
| alt | z.string().min(1) | Yes | — | Non-empty |
| image_path_local | z.string().min(1) | Yes | — | Non-empty |
| render_strategy | z.enum() | No | "image" | "image", "svg", "animation" |
| svg_code | z.string() | No | "" | — |
| source_page | z.number().int().positive() | No | — | Positive integer |
| has_labels | z.boolean() | No | false | — |
| label_descriptions | z.array(z.string()) | No | [] | Array of strings |
| unsplash_search_query | z.string() | No | "" | — |
| embedded_text_ocr | z.object() | No | — | Optional (see below) |

**embedded_text_ocr schema:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|
| detected_languages | z.array(z.string()) | No | [] |
| extracted_strings | z.array(z.string()) | No | [] |

### TableBlockSchema
**Type:** z.object() with BaseBlockFields spread
**Discriminator:** type = "table"
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| type | z.literal("table") | Yes | — | — |
| table_id | z.string() | Yes | — | — |
| table_number | z.string() | Yes | — | — |
| caption | z.string() | Yes | — | — |
| headers | z.array(z.string()).min(1) | Yes | — | At least 1 header |
| rows | z.array(z.array(z.string())) | Yes | — | 2D array of strings |
| table_type | z.string() | No | — | — |
| render_as | z.enum() | No | "styled-table" | "styled-table", "chart", "infographic" |

### CalloutBlockSchema
**Type:** z.object() with BaseBlockFields spread
**Discriminator:** type = "callout"
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| type | z.literal("callout") | Yes | — | — |
| callout_id | z.string() | Yes | — | — |
| variant | z.string() | Yes | — | — |
| title | z.string() | Yes | — | — |
| text | z.string().min(1) | Yes | — | Non-empty |
| icon | z.string() | No | — | — |

### MCQBlockSchema
**Type:** z.object() with BaseBlockFields + MCQSchema.shape spread
**Discriminator:** type = "mcq"
**Fields:** All MCQSchema fields plus:
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| type | z.literal("mcq") | Yes | — | — |
| mcq_id | idSchema('mcq') | Yes | — | `mcq_[a-z0-9]+` |

### ExampleBlockSchema
**Type:** z.object() with BaseBlockFields spread
**Discriminator:** type = "example"
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| type | z.literal("example") | Yes | — | — |
| example_id | z.string() | Yes | — | — |
| example_number | z.string() | Yes | — | — |
| title | z.string() | Yes | — | — |
| problem_text | z.string().min(1) | Yes | — | Non-empty |
| solution_steps | z.array(z.string()).min(1) | Yes | — | At least 1 step |
| final_answer | z.string().min(1) | Yes | — | Non-empty |

### ListBlockSchema
**Type:** z.object() with BaseBlockFields spread
**Discriminator:** type = "list"
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| type | z.literal("list") | Yes | — | — |
| list_type | z.enum() | Yes | — | "ordered", "unordered" |
| items | z.array(z.string()).min(1) | Yes | — | At least 1 item |

### DefinitionBlockSchema
**Type:** z.object() with BaseBlockFields spread
**Discriminator:** type = "definition"
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| type | z.literal("definition") | Yes | — | — |
| term | z.string().min(1) | Yes | — | Non-empty |
| definition_text | z.string().min(1) | Yes | — | Non-empty |

### LearningOutcomesBlockSchema
**Type:** z.object() with BaseBlockFields spread
**Discriminator:** type = "learning_outcomes"
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| type | z.literal("learning_outcomes") | Yes | — | — |
| outcomes | z.array(z.string()).min(1) | Yes | — | At least 1 outcome |

### ComparisonViewBlockSchema
**Type:** z.object() with BaseBlockFields spread
**Discriminator:** type = "comparison_view"
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| type | z.literal("comparison_view") | Yes | — | — |
| caption | z.string() | Yes | — | — |
| headers | z.array(z.string()).min(1) | Yes | — | At least 1 header |
| rows | z.array(z.array(z.string())) | Yes | — | 2D array |
| design_hint | z.string() | No | — | — |

### QuranVerseBlockSchema
**Type:** z.object() with BaseBlockFields spread
**Discriminator:** type = "quran_verse"
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| type | z.literal("quran_verse") | Yes | — | — |
| surah | z.number().int().min(1).max(114) | Yes | — | 1-114 |
| ayah | z.number().int().positive() | Yes | — | Positive integer |
| textbook_urdu_translation | z.string().min(1) | Yes | — | Non-empty Urdu text |
| word_alignments | z.array() | No | [] | See below |
| tafsir_snippet | z.string() | No | "" | — |

**word_alignments array item schema:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| position | z.number().int() | Yes | — | Integer |
| urdu_meaning | z.string() | Yes | — | — |
| grammar_note | z.string().nullable() | Yes | null | String or null |

**Refine conditions:**
- Custom superRefine: Checks for Arabic glyphs using regex `/[\u0600-\u06FF\u0750-\u077F\uFB50-\uFDFF\uFE70-\uFEFF]/`
- Error message: "quran_verse block must not contain Arabic glyphs — Urdu only, position-based mapping required"

### QuranReferenceBlockSchema
**Type:** z.object() with BaseBlockFields spread
**Discriminator:** type = "quran_reference"
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| type | z.literal("quran_reference") | Yes | — | — |
| surah | z.number().int().min(1).max(114) | Yes | — | 1-114 |
| ayah_start | z.number().int().min(1) | Yes | — | >= 1 |
| ayah_end | z.number().int().min(1) | Yes | — | >= 1 |
| textbook_translation_ur | z.string() | No | "" | — |
| curriculum_id | z.string() | No | "" | — |
| display_note | z.string() | No | "" | — |

**Refine conditions:**
- `.refine(data => data.ayah_end >= data.ayah_start, { message: "ayah_end must be >= ayah_start", path: ["ayah_end"] })`

### ActivityBlockSchema
**Type:** z.object() with BaseBlockFields spread
**Discriminator:** type = "activity"
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| type | z.literal("activity") | Yes | — | — |
| title | z.string().min(1) | Yes | — | Non-empty |
| activity_type | z.string() | No | — | — |
| apparatus | z.array(z.string()) | No | [] | Array of strings |
| procedure_steps | z.array(z.string()) | No | [] | Array of strings |
| precautions | z.array(z.string()) | No | [] | Array of strings |
| expected_result | z.string() | No | "" | — |

### EquationBlockSchema
**Type:** z.object() with BaseBlockFields spread
**Discriminator:** type = "equation"
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| type | z.literal("equation") | Yes | — | — |
| latex | z.string().min(1) | Yes | — | Non-empty KaTeX |
| text | z.string().min(1) | Yes | — | Non-empty description |

### NumericalBlockSchema
**Type:** z.object() with BaseBlockFields spread
**Discriminator:** type = "numerical"
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| type | z.literal("numerical") | Yes | — | — |
| problem_text | z.string().min(1) | Yes | — | Non-empty |
| given | z.record(z.string(), z.string()) | No | {} | Key-value pairs |
| required | z.string() | No | — | — |
| solution_steps | z.array(z.string()) | No | [] | Array of strings |
| final_answer | z.string().min(1) | Yes | — | Non-empty |

### ContentBlockSchema (Discriminated Union)
**Type:** z.discriminatedUnion("type", [...])
**Valid type values:**
1. "heading"
2. "paragraph"
3. "formula"
4. "figure"
5. "table"
6. "callout"
7. "mcq"
8. "example"
9. "list"
10. "definition"
11. "learning_outcomes"
12. "comparison_view"
13. "quran_verse"
14. "quran_reference"
15. "activity"
16. "equation"
17. "numerical"

## SCHEMA: src/schemas/topicIngest.schema.js

### Exported Schemas
- LenientFormulaSchema
- KeyTermSchema
- TopicContentExampleSchema
- TopicContentCalloutSchema
- AIAnswerHubEntrySchema
- FAQEntrySchema
- CrossConceptLinkSchema
- EntityExtractionSchema
- DownloadableOutputsSchema
- SourceCitationSchema
- QuranDataSchema
- TopicAssetFigureSchema
- TopicAssetTableSchema
- BookMCQSchema
- ShortQuestionSchema
- NumericalProblemSchema
- ActivitySchema
- FlashcardSchema
- TopicIngestSchema

### LenientFormulaSchema
**Type:** z.object() (partial of FormulaSchema)
**Description:** Partial version of FormulaSchema with latex and text optional
**Fields:** Same as FormulaSchema but `latex` and `text` are optional

### KeyTermSchema
**Type:** z.object()
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| term | z.string().min(1) | Yes | — | Non-empty |
| definition | z.string().min(1) | Yes | — | Non-empty |
| term_type | z.string() | No | — | — |
| first_occurrence_page | z.number().int() | No | — | Integer |
| related_terms | z.array(z.string()) | No | [] | Array of strings |

**Type:** z.object()
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |

| title | z.string() | Yes | — | — |
| problem_text | z.string().min(1) | Yes | — | Non-empty |
| solution_steps | z.array(z.string()) | No | [] | Array of strings |
| final_answer | z.string() | Yes | — | — |
| formula_used | z.string() | No | — | — |

### QuranDataSchema
**Type:** z.object()
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| surah | z.number().int().min(1).max(114) | Yes | — | 1-114 |
| ayah_start | z.number().int().positive() | Yes | — | Positive integer |
| ayah_end | z.number().int().positive() | Yes | — | Positive integer |
| surah_name_english | z.string() | Yes | — | — |
| juz | z.number().int() | No | — | Integer |
| manzil | z.number().int() | No | — | Integer |
| textbook_urdu_translation | z.string().min(1) | Yes | — | Non-empty Urdu |
| word_alignments | z.array() | No | [] | See below |
| tafsir_snippet | z.string() | No | "" | — |

**word_alignments array item schema:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|
| position | z.number().int() | Yes | — |
| urdu_meaning | z.string() | Yes | — |
| grammar_note | z.string().nullable() | Yes | null |

**Refine conditions:**
- Custom superRefine: Checks for Arabic glyphs using regex `/[\u0600-\u06FF\u0750-\u077F\uFB50-\uFDFF\uFE70-\uFEFF]/`
- Error message: "quran_data must not contain Arabic glyphs — Urdu only, position-based mapping required"

| embedded_text_ocr | z.object() | No | default({}) | See below |

| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|
| detected_languages | z.array(z.string()) | No | [] |
| extracted_strings | z.array(z.string()) | No | [] |

### TopicAssetTableSchema
**Type:** z.object()
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| _id | idSchema('tbl') | Yes | — | `tbl_[a-z0-9]+` |
| table_number | z.string() | Yes | — | — |
| caption | z.string() | Yes | — | — |
| headers | z.array(z.string()).min(1) | Yes | — | At least 1 header |
| rows | z.array(z.array(z.string())) | Yes | — | 2D array |
| source_page | z.number().int() | No | — | Integer |
| table_type | z.string() | No | — | — |
| render_as | z.enum() | No | "styled-table" | "styled-table", "chart", "infographic" |

- topics array must not be empty (min(1))
- schema_version must be exactly "2.0.0"

## SCHEMA: src/schemas/index.js

### Exports
Re-exports all schemas from:
- `./common.schema.js` → SlugSchema, idSchema, PresentationProfileSchema, BaseBlockFields
- `./formula.schema.js` → FormulaSchema
- `./mcq.schema.js` → MCQSchema
- `./blocks.schema.js` → All block schemas including ContentBlockSchema

---
## SCHEMA: src/services/validation/tier1.js

### Exported Functions
- checkTier1(rawParsed)

### checkTier1(rawParsed)
**Purpose:** Executes rapid structure presence evaluations across unverified payloads (hard failure checks)

**Input:** `rawParsed` - The raw, unfixed object matrix directly from JSON parsing layers

**Returns:** `{ passed: boolean, errors: Array<{ message: string }> }`

### TIER 1 — Hard Failures (Rejection Conditions)

| # | Condition | Error Message |
|---|-----------|---------------|
| 1 | `!rawParsed` (payload is null/undefined) | "Payload missing or null" |
| 2 | `rawParsed.schema_version !== CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION && rawParsed.schema_version !== "2.0.0"` | `Invalid schema version target. Expected: "${CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION}"` |
| 3 | `topics` array is missing, not an array, or empty | "topics array must not be empty" |
| 4 | Topic at index is not a valid object | `Topic at index ${idx} is not a valid object container` |
| 5 | Topic missing `title` field (undefined/null/empty) | `Topic at index ${idx} is missing required field: title` |
| 6 | Topic missing `slug` field (undefined/null/empty) | `Topic at index ${idx} is missing required field: slug` |

**Notes:**
- Topics are looked up from `rawParsed.topics` OR `rawParsed.container?.topics`
- Essential keys checked per topic: `["title", "slug"]`
- Schema version expected: "2.0.0" (CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION)

---
## SCHEMA: src/services/validation/tier2.js

### Exported Functions
- applyTier2AutoFixes(rawParsed)
- normalizeMcqItem(item, topicId, log, locationRef) - internal helper

### applyTier2AutoFixes(rawParsed)
**Purpose:** Repairs syntax variations, truncates length overruns, and fixes formatting errors

**Input:** `rawParsed` - Structural layout elements passing basic Tier 1 criteria

**Returns:** `{ repaired: any, autoFixLog: Array<{ type: string, topic_id: string, message: string }> }`

### TIER 2 — Auto-Fixes (Silent Repairs)

| # | Condition | What Changes | Log Type | Log Message |
|---|-----------|--------------|----------|-------------|
| 1 | `topic.seo.meta_title.length > 60` | Truncates to 57 chars + "..." | `seo_meta_title_truncated` | `Truncated meta_title from ${oldLength} to ${newLength} characters.` |
| 2 | `topic.seo.meta_description.length > 160` | Truncates to 157 chars + "..." | `seo_meta_description_truncated` | `Truncated meta_description from ${oldLength} to ${newLength} characters.` |
| 3 | `topic.slug` fails SLUG_REGEX test | Applies `sanitizeSlug()` | `slug_sanitized` | `Sanitized invalid slug structure: "${oldSlug}" modified to "${newSlug}"` |
| 4 | `topic.source_page_start` is string | Parses to integer via `Number.parseInt()` | — | (no log) |
| 5 | `topic.source_page_end` is string | Parses to integer via `Number.parseInt()` | — | (no log) |
| 6 | `content_blocks[].source_page` is string | Parses to integer via `Number.parseInt()` | — | (no log) |
| 7 | `content_blocks[].block_order !== orderIdx + 1` | Sets to sequential `orderIdx + 1` | `block_orders_sequentialized` | `Fixed broken gaps or structural duplicates in content_blocks layout coordinates.` |
| 8 | MCQ `correct_answer` is uppercase A-D | Converts to lowercase | `mcq_answer_lowercased` | `Normalized key case mapping at ${locationRef} from "${ans}" to "${item.correct_answer}".` |
| 9 | MCQ `correct_answer` matches option text | Resolves to option key (a/b/c/d) | `mcq_answer_resolved_from_text` | `Mapped full option text match at ${locationRef} back to canonical option key "${key}".` |
| 10 | MCQ answer doesn't match any option | Logs warning (no fix) | `mcq_answer_unmapped_warning` | `MCQ choice text mismatch flagged at ${locationRef}: "${ans}" does not fit options schemas.` |

**Notes:**
- Also applies MCQ normalization to `book_mcqs[]` array
- Uses `structuredClone()` to avoid mutating original
- Returns early if `!repaired || !Array.isArray(repaired.topics)`

---
## SCHEMA: src/services/validation/tier3.js

### Exported Functions
- checkTier3Flags(rawTopic, validatedTopic, documentLevel)

### checkTier3Flags(rawTopic, validatedTopic, documentLevel)
**Purpose:** Evaluates semantic content and parses telemetry data to identify data quality flags

**Input:**
- `rawTopic` - The raw topic payload (pre-Zod normalization)
- `validatedTopic` - Fully clean, typed entity models produced by Zod schemas
- `documentLevel` - Global metadata block details containing compilation attributes

**Returns:** `Array<{ type: string, topic_id: string, ref_id?: string, message: string }>`

### TIER 3 — Quality Flags (Warnings, Not Rejections)

| # | Condition | Flag Type | topic_id | ref_id | Message |
|---|-----------|-----------|----------|--------|---------|
| 1 | `documentLevel.confidence_score < 0.80` | `low_confidence_score` | "document_level" | — | `Ingestion layer runtime confidence falls below platform threshold: ${score}` |
| 2 | `documentLevel.warnings.length > 0` | `ingest_warnings_present` | "document_level" | — | `Upstream pipelines emitted processing warnings: [${warnings.join(', ')}]` |
| 3 | Figure alt text word count < 20 | `short_alt_text` | topic._id | figure._id | `Figure ${figure_number} alternative description text is terse (${wordCount} words). Accessibility pipelines require detailed descriptions.` |
| 4 | Formula missing `latex` OR `text` | `incomplete_formula` | topic._id | formula.formula_id | `Formula target named "${name || 'unnamed'}" lacks LaTeX compilation rendering strings.` |
| 5 | `raw_text` is empty (0 words) | `missing_raw_text` | topic._id | — | "The raw text corpus field is completely empty." |
| 6 | `raw_text` word count < 50 | `low_word_count` | topic._id | — | `The text content length is unusually low (${proseWords} words). Verify content block extraction status.` |
| 7 | Book MCQ options count !== 4 | `irregular_mcq_options` | topic._id | mcq._id or idx_N | `Book MCQ has non-standard options structure configuration (${optKeys.length} choices found instead of 4).` |
| 8 | Content block MCQ options count !== 4 | `irregular_mcq_options` | topic._id | block._id | `Content block MCQ contains abnormal options dimensions (${optKeys.length} choices found instead of 4).` |

**Notes:**
- Flags are warnings only — ingestion continues
- Checks both `validatedTopic.figures[]` and `validatedTopic.formulas[]`
- Checks `rawTopic.book_mcqs[]` and `rawTopic.content_blocks[]` for MCQ option counts
- Word count uses `split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length`

---
## SCHEMA: src/services/validation/index.js

### Exported Functions
- validateQwenOutput(rawJsonStringOrObject)

### Exports (Re-exported Schemas)
- DocumentIngestSchema
- TopicIngestSchema

### validateQwenOutput(rawJsonStringOrObject)
**Purpose:** Orchestrates the validation pipeline across incoming AI parsing runs

**Input:** `rawJsonStringOrObject` - Raw JSON string or pre-parsed object from ingestion endpoints

**Returns:** `Promise<{ valid: boolean, tier?: number, errors?: any[], data?: any, autoFixLog?: any[], flags?: any[], note?: string }>`

### Validation Pipeline Flow

| Step | Action | On Failure Return |
|------|--------|-------------------|
| 1. Parse | If string, `JSON.parse()`. If object, use as-is. | `{ valid: false, tier: 1, errors: [{ message: "Invalid JSON payload structure: ${err.message}" }] }` |
| 2. Tier 1 | Run `checkTier1(rawParsed)` | `{ valid: false, tier: 1, errors: tier1Result.errors }` |
| 3. Tier 2 | Run `applyTier2AutoFixes(rawParsed)` → `{ repaired, autoFixLog }` | (continues) |
| 4. Tier 3 | Run `checkTier3Flags(topicLevel, topicLevel, documentLevel)` | (continues, flags collected) |
| 5. Success | — | `{ valid: true, data: repaired, autoFixLog, flags }` |

**Notes:**
- Accepts both string and object inputs
- Tier 1 failures are hard rejections
- Tier 2 auto-fixes are applied silently with logging
- Tier 3 flags are warnings only, included in response
- Topic level for Tier 3 is `repaired.topics?.[0]` (first topic)
- Document level for Tier 3 is `repaired.ingest_metadata`

---

| editors | [String] | No | [] | — |
| reviewers | [String] | No | [] | — |
| category | String | No | — | — |
| sub_category | String | No | — | — |
| tags | [String] | No | [] | — |
| rights_status | String | No | — | — |
| cover_image_url | String | No | "" | — |
| thumbnail_url | String | No | "" | — |
| content_hash | String | No | — | — |
| document_version | String | No | "1.0.0" | — |
| parent_document_id | String | No | null | — |
| is_latest | Boolean | No | true | — |
| access_control | Embedded | No | — | See below |

**access_control nested:**
| Field | Type | Required | Default |
|-------|------|----------|---------|
| is_premium | Boolean | No | false |
| preview_percentage | Number | No | 100 | min: 0, max: 100 |
| paywall_trigger_elements | [String] | No | [] |
| allowed_roles | [String] | No | ["anonymous"] |

### container nested schema
| Field | Type | Required | Default | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------|
| _id | String | Yes | — | — |
| container_type | String | No | "chapter" | — |
| number | Number | Yes | — | — |
| display_label | String | No | — | — |
| title | String | Yes | — | — |
| title_vernacular | String | No | "" | — |
| slug | String | Yes | — | — |
| page_range | Embedded | No | — | { start, end } |
| total_pages | Number | No | — | — |
| global_objectives | [String] | No | [] | — |
| chapter_summary_verbatim | String | No | "" | — |
| opening_quote | String | No | "" | — |
| opening_image_description | String | No | "" | — |

### topic_refs array schema
| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| _id | String | Yes | — |
| slug | String | Yes | — |
| slug_global | String | Yes | Indexed |
| title | String | Yes | — |
| display_order | Number | No | Default: 0 |
| url_path | String | Yes | — |

### document_aggregates nested schema
| Field | Type | Required | Default |
|-------|------|----------|---------|
| total_topics | Number | No | 0 |
| total_blocks | Number | No | 0 |
| total_formulas | Number | No | 0 |
| total_images | Number | No | 0 |
| total_tables | Number | No | 0 |
| total_mcqs | Number | No | 0 |
| total_short_questions | Number | No | 0 |
| total_numerical_problems | Number | No | 0 |
| total_key_terms | Number | No | 0 |
| total_flashcards | Number | No | 0 |
| all_key_terms | [String] | No | [] |
| all_formulas | [String] | No | [] |
| all_figures | [String] | No | [] |
| difficulty_distribution | Embedded | No | — |

**difficulty_distribution nested:**
| Field | Type | Default |
|-------|------|---------|
| easy | Number | 0 |
| medium | Number | 0 |
| hard | Number | 0 |

### seo_master nested schema
| Field | Type | Required | Default |
|-------|------|----------|---------|
| meta_title | String | No | "" |
| meta_description | String | No | "" |
| canonical_url | String | No | "" |
| og_title | String | No | "" |
| og_description | String | No | "" |
| og_image | String | No | "" |
| og_type | String | No | "article" |
| twitter_card | String | No | "summary_large_image" |
| keywords | [String] | No | [] |
| focus_keyword | String | No | "" |
| robots | String | No | "index, follow" |
| sitemap_priority | Number | No | 0.5 |
| sitemap_changefreq | String | No | "monthly" |
| json_ld_schemas | [String] | No | [] |
| aeo | Embedded | No | — |
| geo | Embedded | No | — |

**aeo nested:**
| Field | Type | Default |
|-------|------|---------|
| primary_question | String | "" |
| featured_snippet_block | String | "" |
| answer_type | String | "definition" |
| entity_type | String | "Concept" |
| faq_count | Number | 0 |

**geo nested:**
| Field | Type | Default |
|-------|------|---------|
| entity_name | String | "" |
| entity_type | String | "EducationalTopic" |
| authoritative_source | String | "" |
| citation_format | String | "" |
| trustworthiness_signals | [String] | [] |
| llm_summary | String | "" |

### publishing nested schema
| Field | Type | Required | Default | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------|
| status | String | No | "draft" | "draft", "processing", "published" (indexed) |
| published_at | Date | No | null | — |
| updated_at | Date | No | null | — |
| url_path | String | No | "" | — |
| export_manifest | Embedded | No | — | See below |
| syndication_targets | [String] | No | [] | — |

**export_manifest nested:**
| Field | Type | Default |
|-------|------|---------|
| web | String | "not_published" |
| json_raw | String | "not_generated" |
| pdf_formatted | String | "not_generated" |
| epub | String | "not_generated" |
| lms_scorm | String | "not_generated" |
| flashcard_deck | String | "not_generated" |
| formula_pack_pdf | String | "not_generated" |

### version_control nested schema
| Field | Type | Required | Default |
|-------|------|----------|---------|
| document_version | String | No | "1.0.0" |
| schema_version | String | No | "2.0.0" |
| prompt_version | String | No | — |
| commit_timestamp | Date | No | — |
| commit_hash | String | No | "" |
| change_log | String | No | "" |
| previous_version_id | String | No | null |
| is_latest | Boolean | No | true |

### Indexes
| Field(s) | Type | Unique | Sparse |
|----------|------|--------|--------|
| ingest_metadata.source_file_sha256 | Single | No | No |
| document_metadata.document_id | Single | No | No |
| document_metadata.subject | Single | No | No |
| document_metadata.subject_slug | Single | No | No |
| document_metadata.grade_numeric | Single | No | No |
| topic_refs.slug_global | Single | No | No |
| publishing.status | Single | No | No |
| is_archived | Single | No | No |
| { subject: 1, grade_numeric: 1 } | Compound | No | No |
| { is_archived: 1 } | Compound | No | No |

### Relationships
| Field | References Collection | Type | Notes |
|-------|----------------------|------|-------|
| topic_refs[]._id | topics | String | Topic IDs in this document |
| parent_document_id | documents | String | Parent document for versioning |
| previous_version_id | documents | String | Previous version in chain |

### ID Format
**_id type:** String (custom)
**Custom ID field:** document_id
**ID generation:** From id.service.js (likely `doc_` prefix)

---
